args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description 
FROM "Order" o 
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId 
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id 
WHERE (o.AccountId = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' OR o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') 
AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' 
AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01' 
AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%processing%')

args.query:
SELECT ol.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description, o.CloseDate, o.StageName
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem ol ON o.Id = ol.OpportunityId
JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON ol.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' 
AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01' 
AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%processing%')

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ol.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description, o.CloseDate, o.StageName
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem ol ON o.Id = ol.OpportunityId
JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON ol.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' 
AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01' 
AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%processing%')
